title: Glory to Christ on high
publicDomainBasis: James Allen (1734–1804), Felice de Giardini (1716–1796). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Glory to Christ on high!
Let praises fill the sky!
Praise ye His name:
He all our sorrows bore;
Angels His name—adore,
And saints cry evermore,
“Worthy the Lamb!”

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
All they around the throne
Cheerfully join in one,
Praising His name:
We who have known His blood
Sealing our peace with God,
Spread His dear name abroad;
Worthy the Lamb!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Join all the human race
Our Lord, God’s Christ, to bless,
Praise ye His name:
In Him we will rejoice,
Making a cheerful noise,
Saying with heart and voice,
“Worthy the Lamb!”

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
Though we must change our place,
Our hearts shall never cease
Praising His name:
To Him we’ll tribute bring,
Laud Him, our gracious King,
And without ceasing, sing,
“Worthy the Lamb!”
